member.name: T:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.AwsSecretManager
member.summary: Provides a singleton implementation for interacting with AWS Secrets Manager.
member.remarks: This class is designed to retrieve secret values from AWS Secrets Manager using a pre-configured request. It ensures that the appropriate secret is fetched based on the application's environment (e.g., production or pre-production). The class is intended to be used as a singleton to centralize secret management within the application.

member.name: M:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.AwsSecretManager.#ctor(Amazon.SecurityToken.Model.AssumeRoleRequest,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.AwsSecretManager})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AwsSecretManager class, optionally assuming an AWS role for credentials.
member.remarks: This constructor configures the AWS Secrets Manager client using either the provided role or default credentials. The client is initialized for the region and secret specified in the environment variables. Ensure that the required environment variables are set before instantiating this class.
member.param: An optional AssumeRoleRequest specifying the AWS role to assume for authentication. If null, the default credentials are used.
An optional logger for logging errors and information. If null, logging is disabled.
member.exception: Thrown if the AWS Secrets Manager client cannot be initialized due to configuration or connection errors.

member.name: M:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.AwsSecretManager.GetAWSSessionCredentialsAsync(Amazon.SecurityToken.Model.AssumeRoleRequest)
member.summary: Asynchronously obtains temporary AWS session credentials by assuming the specified IAM role.
member.remarks: The returned credentials are valid for a limited duration as specified in the AssumeRole request. Use these credentials to access AWS resources with the permissions of the assumed role.
member.param: The request parameters for the AssumeRole operation. Cannot be null.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the temporary AWS session credentials, or null if the request is null.

member.name: M:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.AwsSecretManager.GetSecretsKeyNamesAsync
member.summary: Asynchronously retrieves the names of all available secret keys.
member.returns: A list of strings containing the names of all secret keys. The list will be empty if no secrets are available.
member.exception: Thrown if the method is called in a production environment, where listing secret key names is not permitted.
Thrown if an error occurs while retrieving the secret values.

member.name: M:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.AwsSecretManager.GetSecretValueAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously retrieves the secret value associated with the specified key.
member.remarks: This method retrieves sensitive information securely from a secret store. Ensure that the caller has appropriate permissions to access the secret store and handle the returned value securely.
member.param: The key used to identify the secret value. Cannot be null or empty.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the secret value as a string.

member.name: M:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.AwsSecretManager.GetSecretsAsync
member.summary: Asynchronously retrieves a collection of secrets from AWS Secrets Manager.
member.remarks: This method fetches the secret value associated with the configured request and parses it into a dictionary of key-value pairs. The secret value is expected to be in JSON format.
member.returns: A containing the secrets as key-value pairs.
member.exception: Thrown if an error occurs while retrieving the secret value.

member.name: T:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.EnvVariable
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.EnvVariable.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.EnvVariable.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.EnvVariable.AwsSecretsManagerArn
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to AWS_SECRETS_MANAGER_ARN.

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.EnvVariable.AwsSecretsManagerName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to AWS_SECRETS_MANAGER_NAME.

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.EnvVariable.AwsSecretsManagerRegion
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to AWS_SECRETS_MANAGER_REGION.

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.EnvVariable.AwsSecretsManagerRoleArn
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to AWS_SECRETS_MANAGER_ROLE_ARN.

member.name: P:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.EnvVariable.AwsSecretsManagerRoleSessionName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to AWS_SECRETS_MANAGER_ROLE_SESSION_NAME.

member.name: T:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.IAwsSecretManager
member.summary: Defines a singleton interface for interacting with AWS Secrets Manager.
member.remarks: This interface provides a method to retrieve secret values from AWS Secrets Manager asynchronously. Implementations of this interface are expected to handle the retrieval process and any associated errors.

member.name: M:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.IAwsSecretManager.GetSecretValueAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously retrieves the secret value associated with the specified key.
member.remarks: This method retrieves sensitive information securely from a secret store. Ensure that the caller has appropriate permissions to access the secret store and handle the returned value securely.
member.param: The key used to identify the secret value. Cannot be null or empty.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the secret value as a string.

member.name: M:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.IAwsSecretManager.GetSecretsKeyNamesAsync
member.summary: Asynchronously retrieves the names of all available secret keys.
member.returns: A list of strings containing the names of all secret keys. The list will be empty if no secrets are available.
member.exception: Thrown if the method is called in a production environment, where listing secret key names is not permitted.
Thrown if an error occurs while retrieving the secret values.

member.name: T:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.Register
member.summary: Provides extension methods for registering AWS Secrets Manager services with a dependency injection container.
member.remarks: This class contains static methods to facilitate the integration of AWS Secrets Manager into applications using dependency injection. Use these methods during application startup to configure service registration.

member.name: M:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.Register.AddAwsSecretManagerService(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds the AWS Secrets Manager service to the specified service collection for dependency injection.
member.remarks: This method registers the IAwsSecretManager interface with a singleton lifetime. Call this method during application startup to enable AWS Secrets Manager integration via dependency injection.
member.param: The service collection to which the AWS Secrets Manager service will be added. Cannot be null.

member.name: M:LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.Register.AddAwsSecretManagerService(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Amazon.SecurityToken.Model.AssumeRoleRequest,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{LeadSoft.Adapter.Aws.SecretsManager.AwsSecretManager})
member.summary: Adds the AWS Secrets Manager service to the specified service collection for dependency injection.
member.remarks: Registers the IAwsSecretManager implementation as a singleton in the dependency injection container. This method should be called during application startup to enable secret retrieval from AWS Secrets Manager.
member.param: The service collection to which the AWS Secrets Manager service will be added. Cannot be null.
An optional AWS AssumeRoleRequest used to assume a specific IAM role when accessing secrets. If null, the default credentials are used.
An optional logger instance for logging operations performed by the AWS Secrets Manager service.
